of clothes, tall or illness; (24) in the last by pain caused by stones
or brickbats, or fracture of the bones of shanks; (25) in the first
of Sagittarius by various diseases of the anus; (26) in the second
by poison or wind disease; (27) in the last it is in water or by a
water-disease, or by gastric trouble; (28) in the first of Capricorn
it is by king, violence, tiger or by the amputation of the thigh: (29)
in the second by an aquatic creature, poison, snake, a quadruped
of uncloven hoofs, fire, weapon, thieves, fever or superhuman
agency; (30) in the last by women; (31) in the first of Aquarius
